verses.text: 'Come down, and sit in the dust, O virgin daughter of Babylon'; her tender luxury shall give way to shame. The proud queen-city is brought low. Earthly glory, however delicate, is stripped bare by God's judgment.

'Come down, and sit in the dust, O virgin daughter of Babylon'; her tender luxury shall give way to shame. The proud queen-city is brought low. Earthly glory, however delicate, is stripped bare by God's judgment.

'Come down, and sit in the dust, O virgin daughter of Babylon'; her tender luxury shall give way to shame. The proud queen-city is brought low. Earthly glory, however delicate, is stripped bare by God's judgment.

Our Redeemer is the LORD of hosts; Babylon, who said, 'I shall be a lady for ever,' showed no mercy and laid a heavy yoke on the aged. Cruelty marked her rule. The merciless oppressor will herself be brought to grief.

Our Redeemer is the LORD of hosts; Babylon, who said, 'I shall be a lady for ever,' showed no mercy and laid a heavy yoke on the aged. Cruelty marked her rule. The merciless oppressor will herself be brought to grief.

Our Redeemer is the LORD of hosts; Babylon, who said, 'I shall be a lady for ever,' showed no mercy and laid a heavy yoke on the aged. Cruelty marked her rule. The merciless oppressor will herself be brought to grief.

Our Redeemer is the LORD of hosts; Babylon, who said, 'I shall be a lady for ever,' showed no mercy and laid a heavy yoke on the aged. Cruelty marked her rule. The merciless oppressor will herself be brought to grief.

She boasted, 'I am, and none else beside me,' yet in a moment loss of children and widowhood shall come. Her self-confidence is shattered. The proud who say 'none beside me' usurp the place of God and fall.

She boasted, 'I am, and none else beside me,' yet in a moment loss of children and widowhood shall come. Her self-confidence is shattered. The proud who say 'none beside me' usurp the place of God and fall.
Trusting in her wickedness and wisdom, she shall be overtaken by evil 'thou shalt not know from whence it riseth.' Hidden ruin awaits her. Sin breeds a false security that judgment shatters unawares.
Trusting in her wickedness and wisdom, she shall be overtaken by evil 'thou shalt not know from whence it riseth.' Hidden ruin awaits her. Sin breeds a false security that judgment shatters unawares.

Let her sorcerers and astrologers stand forth; they cannot save her or themselves, but burn like stubble. Her counsellors fail. All the magic and wisdom of Babylon is helpless against the hand of God.
